claim: Researchers at Ben-Gurion University in Israel taught goldfish to steer a specially designed "fish-operated vehicle" to get food.

result.claim: Researchers at Ben-Gurion University in Israel taught goldfish to steer a specially designed "fish-operated vehicle" to get food.
result.reasoning: Despite multiple searches using various keywords related to the claim ("goldfish steer fish-operated vehicle Ben-Gurion University", "goldfish steer vehicle", "goldfish Ben-Gurion University", "goldfish vehicle navigation"), no direct evidence or propositions were found in the knowledge base to support the claim that researchers at Ben-Gurion University in Israel taught goldfish to steer a specially designed "fish-operated vehicle" to get food. The search results provided information on goldfish spatial memory and navigation in general, as well as general information about fish and vehicles, but nothing specifically linking goldfish, vehicle steering, and Ben-Gurion University.
